name: blindkey
description: Secure credential management for AI agents

scripts.publish:dry: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/core --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/local-vault --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/cli --dry-run
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/core --access public && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/local-vault --access public && npm publish --workspace=@blindkey/cli --access public

author: Michael Kenealy
